zh.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson是Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag和Mrs. Benedict Mathisson的兒子，出生。他和Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson是Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag和Mrs. Benedict Mathisson的儿子，出生。他和Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Bengtsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Gunnel, Kerstin, Lars, Per, Sven.  German Hans, Ulrika.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Bengt, Swedish form of Benedict . Compare Bankston , Benson , and Bentson .

variants.name: Bengtson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nils, Algot, Britt, Kjersten, Lars, Nels.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Bengtsson . In some cases this is also an Americanized form of the rare Danish and Norwegian cognate Bengtsen.

variants.name: Bankston
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankson  .
History: Andrew Bankston, alias Anders Bengtsson, came to New Sweden on the Delaware river in 1656; he died in Philadelphia, PA, in 1706.

variants.name: Bengston
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Nels, Nils.

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bankson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankston  .

en.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson was born as the son of Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag and Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.

fr.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson est né, fils de Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag et Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.

de.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson wurde, als Sohn von Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag und Mrs. Benedict Mathisson geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson è nato il come figlio di Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag e Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.

ja.lifeSummary: Näskonung BengtssonはBenedikt Mathsson Natt och dagとMrs. Benedict Mathissonの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Näskonung Bengtssonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson(은)는 Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag(와)과 Mrs. Benedict Mathisson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson nasceu filho de Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag e Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.

ru.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson родился. Его родителей звали Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag и Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.

es.lifeSummary: Näskonung Bengtsson nació como hijo de Benedikt Mathsson Natt och dag y Mrs. Benedict Mathisson. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Näskonung Bengtsson.
